_comment: Silent Empire AI — Jarvis Autonomy Configuration
_comment2: Edit this file to change Jarvis autonomous behavior. Changes take effect within 30 minutes. No redeploy needed.

intervals._heartbeat_note: How often the loop wakes up to check timers (default: 30 min)
intervals._briefing_note: How often morning briefing runs (default: every 6 hours)
intervals._scan_note: How often opportunity scan runs (default: every 8 hours)
intervals._status_note: How often standard status update fires (default: every 2 hours)
intervals._startup_note: How long to wait after restart before first action

searches: divorce asset protection high income men
irrevocable trust divorce protection competitors pricing
high income men asset protection lawsuit creditor
output_sections: Content Gaps to Fill This Week

autonomous_dispatch._note: Set to true to allow Jarvis to dispatch agents without being asked. Start false until memory is richer.
autonomous_dispatch._require_note: Minimum Jarvis memory lines before autonomous dispatch activates

clickup._create_note: Set true to have Jarvis auto-create ClickUp tasks from opportunity scans

business_context._note: Override these to white-label for a different client. Leave empty to read from business.json
